MINI MINUTES: NO APPEARANCES. TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED. Plaintiff's Motion To Compel Production Of Documents Pursuant To Notice Of Deposition With Records Requested is Granted in part and denied in part. Objections to the production of particular documents may be made at the deposition and do not have to be objected to three days prior to the deposition. As the objections are made to the production of documents for units other than Plaintiff's unit, the requests are overly broad. Any documents withheld pursuant to privilege must be identified with particularity, and Defendant is ordered to identify in writing any documents withheld pursuant to a claim of privilege. That identification shall be made within 10 days of notice of this order. All requests for sanctions are denied. (612/HEWLETT)
